real_weddings.venue: home  wedding vendors  destination wedding venue  ayana resort and spa, bali

real_weddings.title: TERINSPIRASI FILM 'IN THE MOOD FOR LOVE', INILAH PERNIKAHAN ARTSY ALA GRATANNIA DAN STEVEN DI BALI

about:
Located on 90-hectares of cliff-top land perched above Jimbaran Bay, AYANA Resort and Spa, BALI, The Villas at AYANA, and RIMBA Jimbaran BALI by AYANA offer a truly romantic destination wedding experience surrounded with unmatched sunset views of the Indian Ocean. From intimate family celebrations to galas for up to 3,000 guests, AYANA’s certified Wedding Consultants will maximize your wedding’s potential and personalize your special occasion to perfection. AYANA’s enchanting Bali wedding venues range from stunning air-conditioned chapels and magnificent wedding decks stretching out over the ocean, to white-sand beach, ballroom, and garden weddings. And with a brigade of chefs from around the globe, AYANA is one of the island’s only destinations able to provide an extensive choice of top-shelf menus including Mediterranean, Indian and Chinese, as well as Mexican, Japanese, Western, and Indonesian cuisine, plus bespoke dining requests.

 

The wedding party have the additional benefit of over 775 rooms, suites and villas to choose from before, during and after the ceremony. The resort also features a host of convenient facilities such as wedding boutiques, private beach, tennis and golf putting, and 2 award-winning spas.

 

Please contact us for further information on AYANA wedding packages and start planning your dream destination wedding.
